_golden_truth._note: Hand-calculated reference answers. Used by eval harness to score agent output. Not shown to the agent.
_golden_truth.baseline_carbon_assumptions: DEFRA 2026 natural gas factor 0.18293 kgCO2e/kWh; UK electricity factor 0.193 kgCO2e/kWh (2026 forecast); excludes upstream Scope 3.

expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.biomass_boiler: dairy GMP / contamination risk; rarely deployable in close proximity to milk processing
expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.100pc_hydrogen_boiler: no hydrogen network in Carlisle, no on-site electrolyser viable at this scale today
expected_shortlist_must_exclude_with_rea.waste_heat_recovery_chiller_to_HW: chiller-condensate WHR deliverable sink ~70°C cannot serve 85°C hot water with the 5 K LMTD margin (CIBSE AM17, BS EN 14825). Same gate as simulate_site_dispatch.

balanced_pathway_sketch.year_1: Install 2 MW NH3 high-temp HP for hot water + waste heat recovery from existing chillers
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_2_3: Install 4 MW electrode boiler hybrid for steam (peak shaving + grid-aware dispatch)
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_3_4: Add 8 MWh thermal storage to enable off-peak electrification
balanced_pathway_sketch.year_5_plus: Reassess as grid intensity reduces and ETS extends to non-traded sector

uncertainty_acceptance._note: Acceptance bands for monte_carlo_uncertainty on the Balanced pathway under the dairy_5mw regenerate-script settings. Iter-2 anchor move: ETS £100/tCO2e (DESNZ Energy and Emissions Projections 2024 central trajectory at 2030, mid-horizon for the 2026-2040 plan) and IETF grant fraction 0.38 (median IETF Phase 3 award rate per DESNZ Phase 3 award schedule 2024); pathway_selection_rule unchanged (max_reduction_positive_npv). Under these defensible empirical anchors, prob_npv_positive jumps from 0.51 → 0.80 (clears the 0.70 spec_target), CVaR_95 stays a meaningful loss (~£918k vs ≥£10k target). The Sobol top-2 spec target {electricity_price, ietf_grant_outcome} remains structurally unattainable in v0: gas_price holds the top Sobol total-order index because the gas-only counterfactual baseline scales fully with the gas tariff, and the DESNZ wholesale gas envelope (triangular ±20%) is the right empirical input — narrowing it would distort the input distribution. ietf_grant_outcome ranks 3rd at ST≈0.18 vs gas_price ST≈0.37 / electricity_price ST≈0.34. spec_targets retained as the formal v0 anchor for the two metrics it now meets; the third (Sobol top-2 set) is declared a v0.2 follow-up — fixed properly when the per-trial dispatch loop replaces the closed-form re-evaluation and lets gas-price uncertainty propagate through HP/EB switching rather than the static gas-only counterfactual.

honest_observed_v0_bands._note: Bands re-calibrated after assessment_2026_05_06_fixes Phase 5b baseline-eff fix. The previously-credited phantom Scope-1 abatement (~585 t/yr from process-heat/0.85 ≠ declared meter) was removed when compute_baseline_carbon and pathway dispatch were reconciled to the same declared natural-gas meter. Honest dairy economics under £100/38% overlay now show prob_npv_positive ≈ 0.55 (was 0.80) and CVaR_95 a positive £-loss of ~£700k. spec_targets retained for the year-7 expert review — they are the engineering target the engine should meet once per-trial dispatch replaces closed-form re-evaluation in v0.3 (which will let gas-price uncertainty propagate through HP/EB switching rather than the static counterfactual).

key_decisions_for_senior_review: Confirm 350m² space envelope is genuinely available (typical dairy sites underestimate by 30%)
Confirm site grid headroom — DNO discussion required for >1.5MW of HP+electrode boiler load
Validate the assumption that existing NH3 chillers can be cascade-coupled to new HP without fouling risk on the dairy side
Confirm IETF eligibility for grant — sub-sector classification matters
Sensitivity: if electricity price exceeds 22 p/kWh forward 5y, balanced pathway IRR drops below 8% threshold
